product: Data type mapping update for Lakebase synced tables
tagline: For newly created synced tables, TIMESTAMP types in source tables are now mapped to TIMESTAMP WITH TIMEZONE in synced tables.
what_it_does: For newly created synced tables, TIMESTAMP types in source tables are now mapped to TIMESTAMP WITH TIMEZONE in synced tables. In existing synced tables, TIMESTAMP types continue to map to TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIMEZONE. info Lakebase Provisioned is the original Lakebase offering that uses provisioned compute you scale manually.
why_it_matters: info Lakebase Provisioned is the original Lakebase offering that uses provisioned compute you scale manually.
key_takeaway: For newly created synced tables, TIMESTAMP types in source tables are now mapped to TIMESTAMP WITH TIMEZONE in synced tables.
